a.xlink:title: Re-evaluate timers, flags and inputs to select the next state.
Ensure BLE is in the expected lifecycle state (advertising/connected).
Try sampling sensors and enqueue a new SensorPacket.
Run diagnostics and recovery paths for unrecoverable errors.
Transfer the next buffered packet via BLE notification.
Check if a BLE central device is currently connected.
Initialize the BLE peripheral for the sensor.
Enter the ERROR_STATE and capture context for diagnostics.
Add a packet to the circular buffer.
Assemble a SensorPacket using the most recent sensor readings.
Drop the oldest packet from the circular buffer.
Validate the integrity of the buffer state.
Read temperature and humidity from the DHT sensor and store in a packet.
Commit the removal of the last peeked packet.
Get a reference to the sensor BLE characteristic.
Peek at the oldest packet without removing it.
